title: Design Patterns
subtitle: GoF + modern patterns in C#
description: Patterns are a vocabulary for design decisions. Cover all 23 GoF patterns plus modern C# patterns like Result, Options, and Pipeline — with real-world implementation examples.
learningOutcomes: Identify and implement all 23 GoF patterns
Explain when NOT to use a pattern
Implement Repository, Unit of Work, CQRS
Use the Result pattern instead of exceptions
